scene: A close-up portrait of a golden cavoodle dog's face, identical to the reference — same wavy golden-caramel fur, same dark round eyes, same brown nose. The dog has a cheeky mischievous expression with mouth slightly open showing teeth in a playful bark. Two small glossy red devil horns protrude from the top of his head through the curly fur. The background is a soft gradient from dark navy (#0f1117) at the edges to a subtle warm orange-red glow behind the dog's head. A few tiny floating embers. The fur catches warm amber side-lighting. This is a logo/avatar image — clean composition, face centered, reads well at small sizes. Shot with 85mm f/2, ISO 400, dramatic warm lighting.
